content: A quick glance on my part and I had just enough time to avert my gaze to the front as a shower of glass from the window of  his $100,000 Porsche 911 Targa exploded against the side of my face. All this not even a quarter of a mile from their house and 20 yards from the bus stop. A totally unnecessary trip on all of our parts, but I think he felt bad about firing me and somehow wanted to make it up to me by easing me on my way... Don't remember why I started on this anecdote...well it had something to do with my familiarity with computers and softwares etc...
